articles.headline: Lamine Yamal: 'Incredible' to see Lionel Messi still starring at World Cup
articles.description: Spain winger Lamine Yamal has said he is thrilled to see Lionel Messi defy time and continue to have a starring role at this World Cup.

images.credit: Photo by Grzegorz Wajda/SOPA Images/LightRocket via Getty Images

articles.headline: Keir Starmer hints at bank holiday if England win World Cup
articles.description: An England World Cup win could mean an extra bank holiday, Sir Keir Starmer has hinted ahead of a quarterfinal clash with Norway.

article.headline: Cape Verde's dream run continues, will face Argentina in R32
article.description: Cape Verde drew Saudi Arabia 0-0 to finish second in Group H
article.linkText: Cape Verde's dream run continues, will face Argentina in R32

images.name: Burley: Cape Verde reaching knockout stages is a 'great story'
images.caption: Burley: Cape Verde reaching knockout stages is a 'great story'

video.headline: Burley: Cape Verde reaching knockout stages is a 'great story'
video.shortHeadline: Burley: Cape Verde reaching knockout stages is a 'great story'
video.caption: Burley: Cape Verde reaching knockout stages is a 'great story'

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Analysis (Burley: Cape Verde reaching knockout stages is a 'great story') 2026/06/24 GLOBAL FIFA WORLD CUP

article.story:
HOUSTON -- Cape Verde completed an improbable run through the group stage with a third straight World Cup draw to become the smallest country to earn a spot in a FIFA World Cup knockout round following a 0-0 draw against Saudi Arabia on Friday night.

The small island nation off the western coast of Africa, which is making its debut on the game's grandest stage, had already held 2010 champion Spain to a 0-0 draw and then came from behind to get a 2-2 result against Uruguay.

Cape Verde's three points put the team in second place behind Spain, who beat Uruguay on Friday night and won the group.

Cape Verde will play reigning World Champions Argentina in Miami on July 3.

On the eve of the match, Cape Verde coach Bubista mused, "everyone is entitled to dream and nothing is impossible."

The Blue Sharks proved him right, overcoming seemingly insurmountable odds as this country of just more than 500,000 reached the round of 32.

A woman, her face painted with a flag of the archipelago, held a sign that read: "Small Islands, Big Dreams."

A dream that these underdogs have made reality as they continue their charmed run on the world stage.

They did it with another strong game from Vozinha, the 40-year-old goalkeeper whose tournament success has helped him amass more than 16 million Instagram followers.

He had a save in first half stoppage time, grabbing a header from Mohamed Kanno to keep Saudi Arabia scoreless. Another save came in the 66th minute when he leaped to deflect a shot from Mohammed Abu Al-Shamat.  A third came in the 92nd minute when he stopped a shot by Abdullah Al-Hamdan.

Cape Verde had a chance to score in the 50th minute, but Kevin Pina's shot from distance was just above the crossbar. Another chance came in the 74th minute when Laros Duarte's shot from the middle of the box was stopped by goalkeeper Mohammed Al-Owais.

A last chance to score came in the final seconds when Nuno da Costa sent a shot from the middle of the box wide left.

But it didn't matter because a couple of minutes after the final whistle, Spain completed its victory over Uruguay and set off a joyous celebration among Cape Verde's players and fans, many of whom cried as they rejoiced.

stats.name: duelsWon

stats.name: groundDuelsWon

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: wonContest
stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.name: finalThirdEntries

stats.description: Carries that significantly move the ball toward the opponent’s goal
